summary: This checkpoint connects the W1479 raw-field route to the W1625 full-data direct-localization boundary. W1479 constructs the W987 full-data provider from 62 raw fields, and W1625 consumes that provider directly after eliminating the W1007 wrapper. This is not product success because the 62 raw-field obligations remain caller-supplied and no nullary OriginalFourTaskProductSuccess declaration is introduced.
obligations_discharged: Added W1479 raw-field conversion to the W1625 one-input full-data direct-localization boundary input.
Added W1479 raw-field stable-package bridge through W1625 and the canonical direct-localization boundary.
Added OriginalFourTaskProductData constructors and projection/equality lemmas for the W1479-through-W1625 route.
Updated RequiredDeclarations to check the new bounded-derived bridge and ProductData surfaces.
obligations_derived_or_eliminated: The ProductData frontier is reduced from the W1490 73-field surface to the W1479 62-field surface.
The W1479-constructed W987 full-data provider now feeds the W1625 boundary that has already eliminated the W1007 branch-full-data wrapper.
The new ProductData surface is connected to the canonical direct-localization boundary without going through W1490/W1496.
known_gaps: No declaration currently defines OriginalFourTaskProductSuccess or originalFourTaskProductSuccess.
No nullary W1479 raw-field input or W987 full-data provider was constructed.
The W1479 raw-field input still packages 62 target, relation, closed-embedding, strict-preimage, localized-right-adjoint, localized-unit, and unit mapping-cone obligations.
Typeclass synthesis still does not provide a nullary bounded-derived stable package for MetrizableLCA.
remaining_work: Construct a mathematically honest nullary W1479 raw-field input from true smaller providers, or identify the exact missing source theorem for each W1479 leaf.
Use a nullary W987 provider to build the bounded-derived stable package and then the original four-task product success witness.
Run the Tier C review packet and full contract audit before permitting update_goal complete.
